creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update to 1.4.23. Includes the changes mentioned in 192170, which suggested updating to 1.4.21.

per usual I've stashed the distfile into LOCAL/adamw.

sunpoet, npm makes new releases very regularly, and many of the changes are marked critical. I'm trying to help you out by doing all the legwork for you, but if you sit on the PR's for a month at a time they'll never catch up.
